summary: Gamma 정상 SSE 응답 포맷 캡처 완료. generation 엔드포인트는 10개 SSE 이벤트를 스트리밍하며, 마지막 이벤트로 type=done, data=stop을 전송하여 종료한다.

event_structure.description: Events 1-9 are content chunks (type=chunk/content), Event 10 is termination (type=done, data=stop)

events_summary.data_preview: 히는 활동을 통해 삶의 활력을 얻습니다. - **...

key_findings.content_events: type=chunk, data contains Korean text (outline content streamed incrementally)

additional_requests.name: render-generation
additional_requests.note: Called after outline generation completes, renders the final outline

implications_for_etap_warning.sse_format: Gamma uses standard SSE with event types (chunk for content, done for termination)
implications_for_etap_warning.termination: Last event has type=done and data=stop - Etap generator should send similar termination
implications_for_etap_warning.protocol: h2 over TLS to Cloudflare-hosted API (2606:4700:xxxx IPv6)
implications_for_etap_warning.recommendation: Etap warning generator should: (1) send warning text as chunk events, (2) end with type=done data=stop event, (3) use text/event-stream Content-Type
